category_sources: Official repository description calls it a giant text-mode clock.
source_facts.description says vtclock is a text-mode fullscreen digital clock.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is dse/vtclock.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the available project documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/dse/vtclock; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository description identifies it as a text-mode clock.
source_facts.description identifies a text-mode fullscreen digital clock.
